DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT NORTH EAST MEDICAL SERVICES, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 302 PURSUANT TO 170.6 CHALLENGE. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Hearing On Defendant North East Medical Services Inc.'S Demurrer To The First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Patricia Hough of Moss & Hough (399.1110) for plaintiffs and responding parties; Michael E. Delehunt of Foley & Lardner (434.4484) for defendant and moving party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NORTH EAST MEDICAL SERVICES INC.'S Demurrer To The First Amended Complaint is overruled, 10 days leave to answer. This order is without prejudice to any motion for relief down the road. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
